description_long: This bonsai features a stylized, low-poly design with three prominent, rounded green foliage clusters arranged asymmetrically atop a single, thick brown trunk. The trunk is slightly tapered and exhibits a gentle, naturalistic curve, branching out into three main limbs that support the foliage. The foliage is depicted as smooth, faceted spheres, giving the tree a playful and simplified appearance. The trunk and branches are rendered in a uniform brown color, with no visible bark texture or fine detail. There is no visible pot or container at the base, suggesting the focus is entirely on the tree form. The overall impression is of a compact, decorative bonsai suitable for urban or park environments.
description: A stylized bonsai with three rounded green foliage clusters on a gently curved brown trunk, lacking a visible pot and featuring a simple, low-poly design.
description_view_0: The bonsai is seen with two foliage clusters on the left and one on the right, with the trunk curving slightly to the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rightmost foliage cluster, with the trunk and branches more visible and the leftmost cluster partially obscured.
description_view_2: The central foliage cluster is most prominent, with the trunk appearing straighter and the lower cluster more visible.
description_view_3: All three foliage clusters are visible, with the trunk curving to the right and the leftmost cluster partially shadowed.
attribute_pot_type: No pot is visible; the base of the trunk is exposed and not contained within any vessel.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is gently curved, following an informal upright style with a natural, flowing movement and subtle bends.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are sparse and asymmetrically arranged, each supporting a single foliage cluster, creating a balanced yet open silhouette.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is moderate in density, with each cluster appearing full but not overly lush, leaving some open space between clusters.
